'''sanguchu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyphoscoliosis|kyphoscoliosis]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-ng-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyphoscoliosis|kyphoscoliosis]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sanguchu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sængichith|sængichith]] || [[word:sængichij|sængichij]] || [[word:sængichish|sængichish]] || [[word:sængichi|sængichi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:sangunguchuth|sangunguchuth]] || [[word:sangunguchuj|sangunguchuj]] || [[word:sangunguchush|sangunguchush]] || [[word:sangunguchu|sangunguchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:sanguchuth|sanguchuth]] || [[word:sanguchuj|sanguchuj]] || [[word:sanguchush|sanguchush]] || [[word:sanguchu|sanguchu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sangufchuth|sangufchuth]] || [[word:sangufchuj|sangufchuj]] || [[word:sangufchush|sangufchush]] || [[word:sangufchuf|sangufchuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sanguchuthu|sanguchuthu]] || [[word:sanguchuju|sanguchuju]] || [[word:sanguchushu|sanguchushu]] || [[word:sanguchuku|sanguchuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sanguchuth|sanguchuth]] || [[word:sanguchuj|sanguchuj]] || [[word:sanguchush|sanguchush]] || [[word:sanguchu|sanguchu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sanguchuthul|sanguchuthul]] || [[word:sanguchujul|sanguchujul]] || [[word:sanguchushul|sanguchushul]] || [[word:sanguchukul|sanguchukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sanguchuthuthu|sanguchuthuthu]] || [[word:sanguchujuju|sanguchujuju]] || [[word:sanguchushushu|sanguchushushu]] || [[word:sanguchuku|sanguchuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sanguchuthun|sanguchuthun]] || [[word:sanguchujun|sanguchujun]] || [[word:sanguchushun|sanguchushun]] || [[word:sanguchukun|sanguchukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sanguchuthuoro|sanguchuthuoro]] || [[word:sanguchujuoro|sanguchujuoro]] || [[word:sanguchushuoro|sanguchushuoro]] || [[word:sanguchukuoro|sanguchukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
